msg: No users configured, creating default user
Attempting to load services from config path
⚠️  Running without a global API key. This is NOT recommended for production deployment.
Database appears empty, initializing with default configuration...
No users found, creating default admin user...
Please save this password immediately and change it upon first login.

msg: Queueing service for registration from config
Queueing service for registration from config
CORSMiddleware (MCP) is a placeholder and does not handle HTTP CORS. Ensure HTTP CORS is configured via the HTTP server middleware (HTTPCORSMiddleware).
UI directory ./ui contains package.json. Refusing to serve source code for security.

tool.description: Get the Moon phase information (returns text/ASCII art).

args.description: Optional arguments to append (e.g. '@2016-10-25' for date, or ',London' for location).

tool.name: wttrin_b658db5c.get_moon_phase

tool.description:
Get the weather forecast for a location in JSON format.
By default uses 'en' language.

location.description:
The location to query. Can be:
- City name (e.g. "Paris")
- Airport code (e.g. "muc")
- Area code (e.g. "94107")
- GPS coordinates (e.g. "-78.46,106.79")
- Special locations: "~Eiffel+tower"

tool.name: wttrin_b658db5c.get_weather
